Petition To Discover Estate Assets And Compel Accounting Therefor
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alexis Chiu for Petitioner.

The Court notes it views petitioner's request to issue citation for production of documents as a last resort rather than a first resort. Mr. Chiu stated he has obtained funds from the State, has some statements for accounting on Citibank, trying to get other statements due to some discrepancy. The Court noted Citibank is not a party at this point.
The Petition to Discover Estate Assets and Compel Accounting Thereof is DENIED without prejudice.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
